_note: Hand-authored seed fixture (no live LLM was available at creation). Regenerate with `task test:goldens:record`. Shape derived from bots/whats-next/main.bot schemas roadmap + roadmap_item. Assignees must resolve to a real catalog bot or be empty.

input.user_priorities: improve test coverage and developer tooling

long_term.title: Establish a golden-test corpus for all catalog bots
long_term.body:
Extend the botreplay framework to cover every shipped bot.

Acceptance: each bot has at least one replayed golden.

short_term.title: Align docs with the new test:goldens task
short_term.body:
Document the golden framework in the testing guide.

Acceptance: docs reference task test:goldens.

next_action.title: Wire feature_dev, whats-next, docs-refresh goldens
next_action.body:
Land the first three golden scenarios and the replay gate.

Acceptance: task test:goldens green in CI.

next_action.title: Investigate flaky e2e timing on slow CI
next_action.body:
No existing bot is a clean fit; leave for human triage.

Acceptance: root cause identified.

output.rationale: Prioritise locking down regression coverage before expanding the catalog.
